title: Elbow Function
parameters: point	Optional.  Point expression.  If point is ommitted, then the elbow orientation of the current robot position is returned.
see_also:
Elbow Statement, Hand, Wrist, J4Flag, J6Flag

Elbow Function Example

Print Elbow(pick)

Print Elbow(P1)

Print Elbow

Print Elbow(P1 + P2)
examples:
Print Elbow(pick)

Print Elbow(P1)

Print Elbow

			Print Elbow(P1 + P2)
